Header file for declaring a global garbage collection function in JerryScript for Mbed OS.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a global function for garbage collection in the context of the JerryScript engine integrated with mbed OS. It includes two header files: `wrap_tools.h` and `logging.h`, which are part of the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry` and `jerryscript-mbed-util` respectively. The macro `DECLARE_GLOBAL_FUNCTION(gc)` is used to declare a global function named `gc`, which is likely intended to trigger garbage collection. The header file is protected against multiple inclusions by the include guard `_JERRYSCRIPT_MBED_DRIVERS_GC_H`.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/wrap_tools.h`
- `jerryscript-mbed-util/logging.h`
